title: What AI Trading Agents Are Up to on Robinhood
summary: But Robinhood’s growth in trading revenue lagged customer trading activity in the first quarter. Similarly, agentic trading could benefit Robinhood if it adds to customers’ overall activity, even if each trade generates less revenue.
